subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Hamd-i-Musha‘sha‘
subcodes.first_line: May a praise effulgent and adorned, brilliant and exalted, ascend to the hallowed realm of nearness unto Him Who is the Beloved
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مشعشع مطرز متلامع مترافع متصاعد هواء قرب قدس حضرت محبوبی است که بیک رنه
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @chastisement and requital, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
